title: 12.5cm Plant Pots, 6 Pack Plastic Flower Pots with Drainage Holes and Saucers, Indoor Outdoor Planters for Succulent and All House Plants(Colourful)
features: 【 Ideal Plant Pots for All House Plants & Succulents】These 5 Inch plastic plant pots are the perfect size for orchids, aloe, snake plants, peace lilies, ZZ plants, succulents, mint, cacti, and herbs. Designed for all house plants, they fit beautifully on windowsills, desktops, and balconies.

【With Drainage Holes & Matching Saucers】Each flower pot includes built-in drainage holes to prevent root rot and ensure proper water flow. Comes with removable saucers to protect surfaces and keep your space neat and clean.

【Lightweight, Durable Plastic Construction】Made from high-quality plastic, these planters are lightweight yet sturdy—resistant to cracking, fading, and deformation. Perfect for both indoor and outdoor plant lovers seeking reliable and stylish growing containers.

【Modern Stripe Texture Design】The elegant stripe grooves give each planter a sleek, decorative look that complements any home or office décor. Use them as flower pots or indoor plant pots to add a modern touch to your living space.

【Versatile for Indoor & Outdoor Gardening】Whether you’re growing herbs in the kitchen or placing succulent planters on the patio, these small plant pots with saucers are designed for versatile use in any environment. Great for beginners and experienced gardeners alike.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Breathable, Drainage Hole, Lightweight, UV Resistant, Weather Resistant
